## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes, why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires schema or API version bump)
- [ ] Docs / tooling
- [ ] Adapter (IPFS / Embedder / VectorIndex)

## Schema / protocol impact

<!-- If this touches xtalent/cv/vN or xtalent/profile-root/vN, link the RFC issue and
     describe the migration path. If not, delete this section. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (Python)
- [ ] `mypy` passes (Python, strict)
- [ ] `tsc` passes (TypeScript, strict)
- [ ] Docs updated if public behavior changed

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #12, Refs #34 -->
